case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JOSHUA BRUHN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100076084) AS TO DEFENDANT BRUHN, JOSHUA
